view.aba.h1.title: // AGE-BASED ALLOCATION
view.aba.hint.intro: A simple heuristic for how much to hold in stocks: equity % = N ã age. The classic N is 100; longer lifespans pushed it to 110 or 120 for more growth. Bonds take the rest, and the equity share falls as you age ã a built-in glidepath toward capital preservation. A rule of thumb, not advice. Updates as you type.

view.breakeven.h1.title: // BREAK-EVEN ANALYSIS
view.breakeven.hint.intro: The most basic small-business question: how many units must you sell to cover your costs? Each unit contributes price ã variable cost toward the fixed costs (its contribution margin); break-even is where that accumulated contribution exactly covers them. Add a target profit to see the volume that earns it, and your expected sales to see the margin of safety. If the contribution margin is zero or negative, no volume ever breaks even ã selling more only loses more.
view.breakeven.warn.no_be: Price is at or below variable cost ã every unit loses money before fixed costs. Raise price or cut variable cost.

view.brrrr.h1.title: // BRRRR
view.brrrr.hint.intro: Buy a distressed property cheap, rehab it to force appreciation, rent it, then refinance against the higher after-repair value and pull your cash back out to do it again. The deal succeeds when the cash-out refi recovers everything you put in ã the cash left in the deal still earns rent, so the cash-on-cash return goes infinite.

view.ccc.h1.title: // CASH CONVERSION CYCLE
view.ccc.hint.intro: How many days a dollar is tied up in operations. DSO is how long customers take to pay (receivables ûñ revenue û period); DIO is how long inventory sits (inventory ûñ COGS û period); DPO is how long you take to pay suppliers (payables ûñ COGS û period). CCC = DSO + DIO ã DPO. A negative cycle is excellent ã you collect before you pay, so growth funds itself. Updates as you type.

view.cdp.hint.intro: Cashing out a CD before maturity triggers a penalty ã usually a set number of months of interest. view.coh.h1.title: // TRUE COST OF HIRE
view.coh.hint.intro: A salary is only part of what an employee costs. Fully loaded adds the employer's payroll taxes, benefits, retirement match, workers' comp, and overhead ã commonly 1.25ûã1.4û base. A 1099 contractor bills a higher rate but covers their own taxes, benefits, and gear, so their cost is just the contract spend. This compares total annual cost and effective hourly (the employee's PTO cuts productive hours, raising their true hourly). Updates as you type.

view.crat.exhaustion.body: Rev. Rul. 77-374: Hvis sannsynligheten for at tilliten vil gûË tom for penger fû¡r veldedighet mottar noe som overstiger 5 %, kvalifiserer ikke tilliten. ûrsaker: utbetalingsrate / ôÏ 7520 sats / forventet levetid kombinasjon. Moderne lave priser + lang forventet levetid har gjort CRATs vanskelig ûË kvalifisere. Merk 2008-90 + Rev. Proc. 2016-42 'klausulen for kvalifisert beredskap' lar CRAT inkludere tidlig bestemmelsesklausulen dersom sannsynligheten vil overstige 5%.

view.crat.hint.intro: Bidragsgiver (eller navngitt mottaker) FIXED Dollar annuity (ikke %) hvert ûËr. Min 5%, max 50% av den opprinnelige FMV. Fortsatt ãË 10 % test. 5% sannsynlighet-of-exhaustion test drepte mange CRATs etter-2016. Alle fire hjû¡rner frosset ved finansiering - ingen fremtidig refinansiering. Standard terskelverdier: ãÊ 30 % minimum for ûË unngûË skade, ãÊ 10% Experian-publisert " utmerket", ~1 % observert FICO 800-club-median (med minst ett kort rapportering en balanse). Varianter: standard (ûËrlig reverdi), NICRUT (nett inntekt), NIMCRUT (makeup), FLIP-CRUT (triggere fra NICRUT ã standard). Crypto = eiendom under varsel 2014-21, ikke en sikkerhet. ã Selg ved tap + umiddelbart rebuy uten avslag. Multiple Build Back Bedre / Biden FY25 budsjettforslag for ûË forlenge vask-salg til krypto - DID NOT PASS. Loophole i live nûË.

view.divc.h1.title: // DIVIDEND COVERAGE
view.divc.hint.intro: Is a stock's dividend sustainable? The payout ratio (dividends ûñ EPS) is the share of earnings paid out ã over 100% means the dividend exceeds earnings, funded from cash or debt. Coverage (EPS ûñ DPS) is how many times earnings cover it; retention is what's plowed back. The FCF payout (dividends ûñ free cash flow) is a stricter test, since dividends are paid from cash, not accounting earnings. Updates as you type.

view.dividend_capture.intro: To strategier i ûˋn rangering. Long fangst kjû¡per fû¡r ex-div, selger etter - empirisk prisfall fanger bare ~ 60-80% av utbyttet, etterlater en ~ 30% retentionskant per syklus. Short arb shorts pris-drop delen, betaler lûËn + tx friksjon. LûËnekostnaden er fordelt fra short pct float (ingen betalt SLB-feed): <5%ã0,25%, 5-15% ã2%, 15-30% ã8%, >30% ã25% ûËrlig. Ranking etter beste variant - hû¡y-til-lûËn navn favoriserer kort arg; hû¡y-yield HTB navn favorisere lang. Standarduniverset er en hûËndplukket flytende dividend-payerliste.

view.dr.h1.title: // DEPRECIATION RECAPTURE
view.dr.hint.intro: Depreciation lowers a rental's basis while you hold it; selling claws part of that back. For real property, the depreciation portion of the gain is unrecaptured ôÏ 1250 gain, taxed at a maximum 25% rate; the appreciation above your original basis is regular long-term capital gain. Recapture is limited to the lesser of depreciation taken or the total gain ã a sale at a loss recaptures nothing. NIIT (3.8%) may apply on top. Updates as you type.
view.dr.loss: Sale is at a loss ã no gain and no depreciation recapture.

Defaults OFF - destruktive automatisering er kun opt-in. Etter en brann sover regelen til du eksplisitt Reset.

view.dy.hint.intro: A commercial lender sizes a loan against three ceilings, and the smallest wins: debt yield (NOI ûñ loan, a rate-independent risk measure, floored at ~8ã10%), LTV (loan ûñ value), and LTC (loan ûñ total cost). This shows each ratio for your proposed loan, the max loan each ceiling allows, and which one binds. Complements cap rate and DSCR. Updates as you type.

view.eoq.h1.title: // ECONOMIC ORDER QUANTITY
view.eoq.hint.intro: How much to order at a time, and when to reorder, to minimize total inventory cost. Big batches cut ordering cost but raise holding cost; EOQ = ã(2ôñDôñS/H) is the batch size where the two balance (and are equal). The reorder point ã daily demand û lead time + safety stock ã is the on-hand level that triggers the next order so it arrives before you run out. Updates as you type.
view.eoq.warn.infeasible: EOQ needs a positive holding cost and demand. The reorder point still applies.

view.flip.h1.title: // FIX & FLIP UNDERWRITING
view.flip.hint.intro: Two questions every flipper asks. What's the most I can pay? The 70% rule: max allowable offer = ARV û 70% ã rehab; the 30% haircut covers holding, financing, selling, and profit. What do I make? Net profit = sale proceeds (ARV less selling costs) minus every cost ã purchase, rehab, closing, the monthly carry, and the financing (points + interest). Cash-on-cash divides profit by the cash you put in (all-in cost less the loan) and annualizes by the hold. Updates as you type.

view.grm.h1.title: // GROSS RENT MULTIPLIER
view.grm.hint.intro: A fast way to compare rental prices: property price ûñ gross annual rent. A lower GRM is cheaper relative to the rent it produces. Scheduled rent overstates reality, so vacancy and credit loss are netted out (and other income added) into effective gross income ã and an effective GRM on what's actually collected. Updates as you type.
view.guardrails.h1.title: // GUYTON-KLINGER GUARDRAILS
view.guardrails.hint.intro: Dynamic retirement withdrawals. A static 4% rule ignores how the portfolio actually does; guardrails adjust each year's draw so a bad sequence doesn't drain the account and a good one isn't under-spent. Raise with inflation ã but freeze the raise in a down year; cut 10% if the withdrawal rate climbs past the upper guardrail; raise 10% if it falls below the lower one.

view.househack.h1.title: // HOUSE HACKING
view.househack.hint.intro: Buy a 2ã4 unit property, live in one unit, rent the rest. The tenants' rent offsets your carrying cost (mortgage + tax + insurance + maintenance + HOA), so the money that would have been rent builds equity instead. This shows what you actually pay to live there, how it compares to renting, and the property's cash flow once you move out and rent every unit.
view.househack.note.covers: One unit's rent already covers the mortgage P&I.
view.househack.note.partial: The rented units cover part of the carrying cost ã the rest is your housing budget.
view.hrc.combined.body: Historiske rehab kreditter kombinerer ofte med LIHTC ôÏ 42 (lavinntektsboliger), mulighetssone ôÏ 1400Z deferal, og statlige historiske kreditter (NY, MA, GA, RI, MO, VA - de fleste har 20-25% state-on). En typisk sertifisert historisk + LIHTC + statlig kreditt + OZ stabel kan gjenopprette 40-55 % av prosjektkostnadene via skatteincitament.
view.hrc.h1.title: // HISTORISK REHAB KREDIT ôÏ 47

view.hsa.h1.title: // HSA MAXIMISER
view.hsa.hint.intro: Tredobbelt skattefordel: fradragsdyktig ûË gûË i, skattefri vekst, skattefri uttak for kvalifisert medisinsk. Stealth pensjonskonto: betale medisinsk ut av lommen nûË, spare kvitteringer, refundere deg selv tiûËr senere. KrûÎver HDHP (hû¡yduktiv helseplan) dekning.
view.hsa.strategy.body: Max HSA + investere i lavprisindeksfond. Betal gjeldende medisinsk ut av lomme fra skattepliktig konto. Spar alle medisinske mottak. I en alder av 65+ refunderer du deg selv i tiûËr med kvitteringer skattfritt ã eller bruk etter 65 til noe formûËl (beskattet som vanlig, ingen straff, som en tradisjonell IRA).

view.hsa_tracker.intro: HSA er den mest skattepliktige amerikanske kontoen: pre-skatt i, skattefri vekst, skattefri for medisinsk. Etter 65 ûËr beskattes ikke-medisinske uttak som vanlig inntekt (som en tradisjonell IRA ã ingen 20% straff).
view.hsa_tracker.title: // HSA TRIPLE-TAX TRACKER
view.hsatt.h1.title: // HSA TRIPLE-TAX ADVANTAGE
view.hsatt.hint.intro: The HSA is the only account taxed favorably three ways: contributions are deductible, growth is tax-free, and withdrawals for medical expenses are tax-free. This projects an HSA against a taxable account funded with the same gross income ã the taxable side invests only the after-tax amount and pays cap-gains on its growth. The gap is the dollar value of the triple-tax treatment. Updates as you type.

view.irmaa.h1.title: // MEDICARE IRMAA SURCHARGE
view.irmaa.hint.intro: High-income Medicare beneficiaries pay a surcharge on top of the standard Part B and Part D premiums. It's a cliff: cross a MAGI threshold by a single dollar and you owe the full higher tier all year ã no phase-in. IRMAA is assessed per enrolled person on a two-year lookback, so 2026 premiums are set on your 2024 MAGI. That's why Roth conversions, capital gains, and RMDs taken two years before you enroll quietly raise these premiums.

view.lke.h1.title: // ôÏ 1031 LIKE-KIND EXCHANGE
view.lke.hint.intro: Swapping one investment property for another defers the gain ã but only to the extent you fully reinvest. Boot (non-like-kind value you keep) is taxable now: cash received plus net debt relief (old mortgage ã new mortgage, if you trade down). Recognized gain = the lesser of realized gain or total boot; the rest defers into the replacement property's carryover basis (its cost ã deferred gain). A loss isn't recognized. Updates as you type.
view.lke.note.full: Fully deferred ã no boot, no tax due now; the entire gain rolls into the replacement basis.
view.lmf.h1.title: // CAR LEASE PAYMENT
view.lmf.hint.intro: A lease payment is depreciation + finance fee + tax. Depreciation = (cap cost ã residual) ûñ term ã paying for the value lost while you drive. The finance fee = (cap cost + residual) û money factor ã the interest; the money factor is a disguised rate (APR = money factor û 2400). Tax is on the payment in most states. Updates as you type.
view.lobbying.h1.title: // LOBYING DISCLOSURE
view.lobbying.hint.intro: Per-symbol Senatets lobbyinformasjon arkiver (LD-1, LD-2). Overflater problemer et selskap lobbyer pûË + dollar utgifter - nyttig for katalysator forventninger rundt regulatoriske hendelser.

view.ltcg_harvesting.intro: Realisere langsiktige gevinster opp til toppen av 0% LTCG-hake, og deretter umiddelbart gjeninnkjû¡p for ûË stige opp kostnadsgrunnlaget skattfritt. Ingen vask-salgsregel pûË gevinster. 2025 tak (toppen av 0% braketten): enkelt $ 48,350 ôñ MFJ $96,700 ôñ HoH $64,750 ã mûËlt pûË skattbar inntekt (ordinûÎr + LTCG), sûË rom = tak minus vanlig skattepliktig inntekt. Mest nyttig i lavinntektsûËr (sabbatisk, tidlig pensjonering, avslutning, fû¡rste ûËr av FIRE).
view.ltcg_harvesting.title: // LTCG HARVESTING ôñ 0% BRACKET FILL
view.ltvcac.h1.title: // LTV : CAC
view.ltvcac.hint.intro: Does acquiring customers pay off? LTV (lifetime value) = monthly gross profit per customer û average lifetime (100 ûñ monthly churn %) ã gross profit, since you keep only the margin. CAC is the sales + marketing cost per new customer. The LTV:CAC ratio rule of thumb is 3:1; below ~1:1 you lose money on each customer, far above 3:1 you may be under-investing in growth. CAC payback is the months of gross profit to recoup the cost. Updates as you type.
view.lump_sum_vs_dca.empty.invalid: Totalt > 0, DCA mûËneder ãË 2, horisont ãË DCA mûËneder.
view.lump_sum_vs_dca.intro: Vanguard 2012-papir: klumpsum slûËr DCA ~67% av tiden pûË en US 60/40-portefû¡lje, med gjennomsnittlig sluttverdi ~ 2,4% hû¡yere over en 10-ûËrig horisont - fordi tiden i markedet typisk slûËr venter, og DCA etterlater kapital i kontanter som tjener mindre. DCA vinner fortsatt fû¡lelsesmessig (lavere angrevariasjon) og statistisk i ned- og sideveismarkeder. Juster forventet retur under 0%/yr for ûË se DCAs pause-sju.

view.market_gamma_regime.intro: Beregner totalt SPY-nivûË dealer GEX over nûÎrmeste 4 alternativ utlû¡per hver 30 min via den eksisterende gex scanner + Black-Scholes gamma-rû¡rledning. Positive GEX: forhandlere lang gamma ã selge-into-rallies / buy-into-dips re-hedging ã vol-suppressing, middels-omvendende tape. Negativ GEX: forhandlere kort gamma ã kjû¡p-rallies / salg-dips re-hedging ã vol-amplifying, momentum tape. Flip û¡yeblikk beslag den stû¡rste historiske SPX vol utvidelser (Squeeze Metrics, JPM Equity Derivatives, Goldman Quant skrivebord forskning). Portfolio-nivûË regimeindikator - ikke et per trade signal - det forteller deg hvilke strategier har en halevind vs frontvind akkurat nûË.

view.mm.h1.title: // MARKUP vs MARGIN
view.mm.hint.intro: Markup is profit as a percent of cost; margin is the same profit as a percent of price. They are never equal ã a 50% markup is only a 33% margin, and doubling cost (100% markup, "keystone") is a 50% margin. Pricing off the wrong one erodes profit. Pick what you know ã price, markup%, or margin% ã and see all four. Updates as you type.

view.mpt.h1.title: // MORTGAGE POINTS BREAK-EVEN
view.mpt.hint.intro: Paying discount points up front (1 point = 1% of the loan) lowers the rate, and so the monthly payment. Whether it pays off comes down to how long you keep the loan: the break-even is the months for the payment savings to recoup the points cost. Keep the loan past it and the points win; sell or refinance before it and you lose. Updates as you type.

view.paycheck401k.h1.title: // 401(k) PER-PAYCHECK MAXIMIZER
view.paycheck401k.hint.intro: How much per paycheck to hit the annual 401(k) limit by December ã and whether you're about to leave free money on the table. Most plans match per paycheck, so front-loading hits the limit early and stops your contributions (and the match) for the rest of the year, unless the plan trues up the missed match. Spreading evenly captures the full match every period.
view.paycheck401k.note.even: Defer the even amount to capture the match every period.
view.paycheck401k.note.forfeit: Front-loading hits the limit early ã {periods} idle checks forfeit {amount} of match. Spread it out or check for a true-up.
view.paycheck401k.note.ok: Your planned deferral spreads to year-end ã full match every check.
view.paycheck401k.note.trueup: You hit the limit early, but the plan's true-up pays the missed match.
view.paycheck401k.tip.true_up: Some plans pay the missed match at year-end if you front-loaded

view.pia.h1.title: // SOCIAL SECURITY PIA
view.pia.hint.intro: Your full-retirement-age benefit comes from Average Indexed Monthly Earnings (AIME) through a progressive three-tier formula: 90% of AIME up to the first bend point, 32% between the two bend points, and 15% above the second. The 90/32/15 rates are fixed by law; the bend points (2026: $1,286 and $7,749) are indexed yearly and lock in at age 62. Lower earners get a higher replacement rate. Updates as you type.

view.psv.h1.title: // PENSION SURVIVOR ELECTION
view.psv.hint.intro: A pension forces a choice at retirement: single-life pays the most but stops at the retiree's death, or joint-and-survivor pays less now but continues (often reduced) to the surviving spouse. The reduction is the price of survivor protection. The pension-max alternative: take the higher single-life payment and buy life insurance for the spouse ã if the payment minus the premium still beats the J&S amount, you get more income now and protect the survivor. Updates as you type.
view.ptr.h1.title: // PRICE-TO-RENT RATIO
view.ptr.hint.intro: A quick read on whether a market favors buying or renting: home price ûñ annual rent for a comparable home. Under 15 generally favors buying, 15ã20 is borderline, over 20 favors renting (the home is pricey relative to what it rents for). The gross rental yield is the inverse. A screen, not a full rent-vs-buy NPV. Updates as you type.

view.rbf.hint.intro: In a low-income year, convert traditional IRA dollars to Roth up to the top of your current tax bracket ã but not a dollar more, which would spill into the next, higher bracket. view.rr.h1.title: // REAL (INFLATION-ADJUSTED) RETURN
view.rr.hint.intro: A nominal return overstates your gain ã inflation erodes purchasing power and taxes take a cut. The Fisher equation gives the exact real return: (1 + nominal) ûñ (1 + inflation) ã 1. The "nominal ã inflation" shortcut runs a touch high. After-tax real applies the tax to the return first. Over a horizon, the real future value is the principal's purchasing power in today's dollars. Updates as you type.

view.rule_of_72.intro: Mental-mat-snarveier: 72 ûñ sats ã ûËr til dobbel, 114 ûñ sats ã ûËr til trippel, 144 ûñ hastighet ã ûËr til ûË kvadruple. Mest nû¡yaktig ved 6-12% / ûËr; utenfor det spekter av regel-of-N driver. Nû¡yaktig lukket form: n = NOK(k) / NOK(1+r) for multiplikator k og rate r. Begge vist side om side slik at du kan se nûËr snarveien bryter ned.

view.rvs.h1.title: // RENT vs SELL
view.rvs.hint.intro: Keep the property as a rental or sell it and invest the proceeds? This compares total wealth at the end of your horizon, both assuming you liquidate at the end. Sell now: net proceeds (value ã selling costs ã mortgage ã capital-gains tax) compounded at your alternative return. Keep: the property appreciates and throws off rental cash flow (reinvested), then sells at the horizon. Mortgage paydown is ignored (conservative for keeping). Updates as you type.

view.scanner_backtest.empty.no_data: Ingen signaler scoret - prû¡v ûË û¡ke utseendet vinduet eller frû¡ inntektsdata.
view.scanner_backtest.hint.all: Sortert etter 20d Sharpe synker - horisonten Kelly standard til. Skannere uten data (ingen historiske hendelser cached eller ingen pris bars) vises med -.
view.scanner_backtest.hint.interpret: Interpret: ûËrlig Sharpe ãË 1 i de lengre horisontene indikerer en reell kant verdt kapital. Hithastighet ãË 55% med positiv middelverdi er konsekvent. Max-DD viser det verste topp-til-trough - hold det avgrenset mot risikobudsjettet.
view.scanner_backtest.hint.stability_int: Skarpe trending nedover pûË tvers av kvartaler = signal forfall i sanntid. 95 % CI per Andrew Lo 2002 - hvis CI lavere grense er negativ, er strategien statistisk uskillig fra tilfeldig stû¡y. Stû¡rrelse kapital fra CI lavere bundet, ikke overskriften.
view.scanner_backtest.hint.walk_interpre: Hvis test Sharpe er mye lavere enn tog Sharpe, var in-ample-nummeret passet til historien som ikke vil gjenta. Handel OOS-nummeret, ikke IS-nummeret.
view.scanner_backtest.intro: For hver skanner, tar hvert historiske signal det ville ha produsert over det etterfû¡lgende vinduet, ser oppover 1d / 5d / 20d / 60d avkastning fra cached pris bars, og aggregater hitsrate, gjennomsnittlig / median avkastning, ûËrlig Sharpe, og max trekning. PEAD er den fû¡rste kablede skanneren ã backtestable fra den eksisterende earnings events tabellen. Slutt ûË gjette hvilke skannere som har kant; bytte dem med mûËlbare Sharpe > 1.

view.scorp.caveats.body: Rimelig kompensasjon er hûËndhevet - IRS omklassifiserer lave ballede lû¡nninger. S-corp legger til Form 1120-S, K-1 utstedelse, kvartalsvis lû¡nnsregistreringer, statlige franchiseskatter (CA $ 800/yr, NY/IL avgifter). Under ~ $ 80k nettoinntekt, overhead vanligvis overstiger besparelser. Over $ 400k+ inntekt, reduserer FICA cap marginal fordel. Mange handelsmenn bruker en SINGLE-OWNER S-corp spesielt for QBI + SE besparelser.
view.scorp.h1.title: // S-KORP ELECTION CALCULATOR

view.sira.h1.title: // SPOUSAL IRA
view.sira.hint.intro: Normally an IRA contribution needs earned income. The spousal-IRA rule lets a married couple filing jointly fund an IRA for a spouse with little or no income, as long as their combined earned income covers both contributions. Each spouse is still capped at the annual limit ($7,500 for 2026, +$1,100 catch-up at 50+). Updates as you type.

view.spia.hint.intro: A single-premium immediate annuity turns a lump sum into guaranteed income starting now. The monthly payment is the annuity that exhausts the premium over the payout period at the insurer's assumed rate ã the same math as a loan payment, in reverse. The payout rate is the annual income as a percent of the premium. (Period-certain approximation; a true life annuity also prices in mortality.) Updates as you type.

view.tbill.hint.intro: T-bills are quoted on a bank-discount basis, which understates the true return. view.te.h1.title: // TRADE EXPECTANCY
view.te.hint.intro: Whether a system makes money long-run isn't the win rate alone ã it's the win rate weighted by how much you win vs lose: expectancy = (win% û avg win) ã (loss% û avg loss). The break-even win rate is what you'd need at this reward:risk to net zero; a high win rate with a poor reward:risk can still lose. Expectancy in R is the per-trade edge in risk units. Updates as you type.

view.yield_to_call.intro: Ringbare obligasjoner: utsteder kan innlû¡se til en angitt pris pûË angitte datoer. YTC er IRR som antar bindingen er kalt pûË fû¡rste anropsdato. YTM antas ûË vûÎre moden. Utbytte-til-vûÎrste (YTW) er det laveste av YTM og hvilket som helst YTC - det er utbyttet du bû¡r vurdere mot, siden utstederen bare vil ringe nûËr det fordeler dem.

view.yoc.h1.title: // YIELD ON COST
view.yoc.hint.intro: Current yield measures the dividend against today's price; yield on cost measures it against what you paid. For a dividend grower, YOC climbs every year the payout is raised ã a position bought cheaply can yield double digits on cost while its current yield looks modest. Shows YOC vs current yield and a projected YOC at your growth rate. Updates as you type.

view.ytf.h1.title: // YEARS TO FINANCIAL INDEPENDENCE
view.ytf.hint.intro: FI is when your portfolio funds your spending indefinitely at a safe withdrawal rate ã the FI number = annual expenses ûñ SWR (4% ã 25û expenses). Starting from current savings and adding the income-minus-expenses gap each year (grown at your return), this finds the years to reach it. The dominant lever is the savings rate, far more than the return. Updates as you type.
view.zero_based_budget.intro: Dave Ramsey / YNAB regel: hver dollar mûËnedlig inntekt tildeles en jobb fû¡r mûËneden begynner, sûË inntekt ã planlagt = 0. Rapporter totalt planlagt, restover (positiv = ikke-signert, negativ = over-lokalisert) og per kategori varians (faktisk ã planlagt) nûËr du fyller i fakta etter mûËneden.
